posts.text: BREAKING: Iran threatens to target energy sites if the US bombs Iranian power plants. This comes just hours after President Trump said the US would begin targeting Iranian power plants and bridges for each ship Iran targets in the Strait of Hormuz.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
